rulings.Case Title: JOY ANDERSON VS. CITIAPARTMENTS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For (1) Final Approval Of Class Settlement; (2) Approval Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; (3) Approval Of Service Benefit To Class Representative; And (4) An Award Of Sanctions Against Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 16, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF JOY ANDERSON, NICOLAS HARR Notice Of Motion And Motion For (1) Final Approval Of Class Settlement; (2) Approval Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; (3) Approval Of Service Benefit To Class Representative; And (4) An Award Of Sanctions Against Defendants GRANTED. Final Approval of the Class Settlement, Fees and Benefit to class representative is granted as requested. Sanctions granted in the amount of $27,200. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ALL ANIMALS PROPERTIES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories; Compel Further Production Of Docs; Compel A Response To Request For Production Of Docs That Complies With Ccp 2031.210; Compel Defendants To Execute And Produce Verifications To Production Of Docs; And For Monetary And Issue Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 16, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF POODLES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories; Compel Further Production Of Docs; Compel A Response To Request For Production Of Docs That Complies With Ccp 2031.210; Compel Defendants To Execute And Produce Verifications To Production Of Docs; And For Monetary And Issue Sanctions GRANTED in part. Complete verified discovery responses without objections shall be provided (if not yet received by the Plaintiff) by hand delivery to Plaintiff's counsel no later than February 19, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,500 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Request for issue sanctions is denied at this time. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JENIFER EATON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendants Masai Bradford And Antoine Bradford Responses To Request For Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions

Masai Bradford shall provide complete, verified responses without objections by hand-delivery no later than February 18, 2016. Sanctions granted as to Masai Bradford in the amount of $530. Sanctions granted as to Antoine Bradford in the amount of $265. = (501/REQ)
